findings.title: Ensure buttons have discernible text
findings.description: [button-name] Buttons must have discernible text — 18 node(s). https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/button-name?application=playwright

findings.title: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.description: [color-contrast] Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds — 3 node(s). https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/color-contrast?application=playwright

findings.title: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
findings.description: [image-alt] Images must have alternative text — 1 node(s). https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/image-alt?application=playwright

findings.title: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.description: [color-contrast] Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds — 1 node(s). https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/color-contrast?application=playwright

findings.title: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
findings.description: [heading-order] Heading levels should only increase by one — 1 node(s). https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/heading-order?application=playwright

findings.title: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
findings.description: [image-alt] Images must have alternative text — 1 node(s). https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/image-alt?application=playwright

findings.title: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
findings.description: [image-alt] Images must have alternative text — 1 node(s). https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/image-alt?application=playwright

findings.title: No skip navigation link
findings.description: First focusable element is <a> "Campaigns" — not a skip link. Keyboard users must tab through nav on every page.

findings.title: Keyboard trap detected
findings.description: Focus cycled to <a> "Business Class Upgrade Bonus" 5+ times — keyboard users cannot exit this element.

findings.title: No skip navigation link
findings.description: First focusable element is <a> "Campaigns" — not a skip link. Keyboard users must tab through nav on every page.

findings.title: Modal not dismissible with Escape
findings.description: Dialog triggered by "Cancel campaign" does not close on Escape — keyboard trap.

findings.title: No skip navigation link
findings.description: First focusable element is <a> "Campaigns" — not a skip link. Keyboard users must tab through nav on every page.

findings.title: Content overflow at 375px
findings.description: <body> overflows by 529px. Page has horizontal scroll

findings.title: Content overflow at 375px
findings.description: <table.campaigns-list__table> overflows by 496px. Table overflows with no scroll container

findings.title: Touch targets below 44px at 375px
findings.description: 20 element(s) too small. e.g. <button .app-layout__theme-toggle> "Switch to dark mode" 35×40px (need 44px)

findings.title: Content overflows in landscape orientation
findings.description: Page overflows horizontally when viewport rotated to landscape (812×320).

findings.description: <body> overflows by 91px. Page has horizontal scroll

findings.title: Content overflow at 768px

findings.title: Content overflow at 768px
findings.description: <table.campaigns-list__table> overflows by 103px. Table overflows with no scroll container

findings.title: Touch targets below 44px at 768px
findings.description: 20 element(s) too small. e.g. <a .app-layout__nav-link> "nav-campaigns" 106×37px (need 44px)

findings.title: Touch targets below 44px at 768px
findings.description: 7 element(s) too small. e.g. <a .app-layout__nav-link> "nav-campaigns" 106×37px (need 44px)

findings.description: 3 element(s) too small. e.g. <a .app-layout__nav-link> "nav-campaigns" 106×37px (need 44px)

findings.title: Dark mode contrast failures
findings.description: 3 element(s) fail contrast in dark mode. e.g. span "scheduled" ratio=2.97 (need 4.5)

findings.title: Non-text contrast failure
findings.description: <button[data-testid=theme-toggle]> border vs page-background: ratio 1.21 (need 3). Border: rgb(224, 224, 224)

findings.title: Accessible name does not contain visible label
findings.description: <button data-testid="theme-toggle"> is visually labelled "🌙" but aria-label is "Switch to dark mode". Voice-control users saying "🌙" cannot activate this control. Fix: make aria-label start with or contain "🌙".

findings.title: No aria-live region for status messages
findings.description: Page has action buttons (Create campaign) but no role="status" or aria-live region. Success/error outcomes won't be announced to screen reader users.

findings.title: [MANUAL] Audio-only and video-only content
findings.description: Check that audio-only content has a transcript and video-only content has a text alternative.

findings.title: [MANUAL] Captions (pre-recorded)
findings.description: Check that all pre-recorded video includes accurate closed captions.

findings.title: [MANUAL] Audio description (pre-recorded)
findings.description: Check that pre-recorded video has an audio description track describing visual-only information.

findings.title: [MANUAL] Three flashes or below threshold
findings.description: Check that no content flashes more than 3 times per second. Requires visual inspection — cannot be automated.

findings.title: [MANUAL] Timing adjustable
findings.description: If any timed session or content exists, verify users can turn off, adjust, or extend the time limit.

findings.title: [MANUAL] Consistent identification
findings.description: Verify components with the same function are identified consistently across pages.

findings.title: [MANUAL] Error prevention (legal/financial)
findings.description: For forms involving legal or financial data, verify submissions are reversible, checkable, or confirmed before final commit.

findings.title: Non-text contrast failure
findings.description: <button[data-testid=theme-toggle]> border vs page-background: ratio 1.21 (need 3). Border: rgb(224, 224, 224)

findings.title: Link text is not descriptive
findings.description: Link "click here" (href: https://example.com/campaign-docs) is vague out of context. Screen reader users navigating by links list hear only "click here". Replace with descriptive text or add aria-label.

findings.title: Format field missing input instructions
findings.description: <input type="date"> "«r4»" requires a specific format but has no hint text or aria-describedby. Add visible hint text (e.g. "DD/MM/YYYY") linked via aria-describedby.
